_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: Input
_meta.description:
A versatile input component with support for various states, clear functionality, and validation indicators. Built with shadcn/ui principles and modern design patterns.

Features

- Input States
  - Default state
  - Focus state with ring effect
  - Error state with validation
  - Success state with confirmation
  - Disabled state
  - Clear functionality

- Visual Feedback
  - Status indicators
  - Validation messages
  - Clear button
  - Focus rings
  - Smooth transitions
